ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the project is located */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the project is located */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the project construction started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the project construction ended */,
  "architect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the architect or firm that designed the project */,
  "height_ft" REAL /* Height of the project in feet */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or historical information about the project */,
  "image_urls" TEXT /* URLs to images or blueprints of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, on hold) */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., residential, commercial, public) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contractor responsible for the project */,
  "total_floors" INTEGER /* Total number of floors in the project */,
  "building_materials" TEXT /* Main materials used in the construction of the project */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Information about the environmental impact of the project */,
  "sustainability_features" TEXT /* Information about any sustainability features incorporated in the project */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* Link to a detailed page or external resource about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_architect_id FOREIGN KEY ("architect_id") REFERENCES architects ("architect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Average elevation of the city */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Climate type of the city */,
  "major_industries" TEXT /* Major industries in the city */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* Information about the historical significance of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_sq_km" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  "major_religions" TEXT /* Major religions in the country */,
  "geographical_features" TEXT /* Information about the geographical features of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "architects" (
  "architect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architect or firm */,
  "architect_name" TEXT /* Name of the architect */,
  "firm_name" TEXT /* Name of the architectural firm */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the architect or firm */,
  "notable_projects" TEXT /* Notable projects designed by the architect or firm */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the architect */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the architect (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the architect */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education of the architect */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards received by the architect or firm */,
  "influences" TEXT /* Influences on the architect's work */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the architect or firm */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the architect or firm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., exterior, interior, blueprint) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the image */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "copyright_info" TEXT /* Information about the copyright of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_images_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., architect, project manager, researcher) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the project */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the project */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
